ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-17-2023 Continued To Mar-07-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-20-2023 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
Atty. ANDREW R. NEILSON, Esq. of Law Offices of Andrew Neilson (Tel: 415-462-6200) for plaintiff (via Zoom videoconference);
Atty. "JAMES" HUAN LY, Esq. of Hanson Bridgett LLP (Tel: 415-777-3200) for specially appearing defendant Christopher Rosenstock.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER ROSENSTOCK'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant Rosenstock's demurrer to the amended complaint is sustained with 20 days leave to amend, that is, the amended complaint must be filed not later than February 9, 2023. (CCP 430.10(e).)

Plaintiff alleges that defendant is liable to him pursuant to Labor Code sec. 558.1. "[T]o be held liable under section 558.1, an 'owner' ... must either have been personally involved in the purported violation of one or more of the enumerated provisions; or, absent such personal involvement, had sufficient participation in the activities of the employer, including, for example, over those responsible for the alleged wage and hour violations, such that the 'owner' may be deemed to have contributed to, and thus for purposes of this statute, 'cause[d]' a violation." (Usher v. White (2021) 64 Cal.App.5th 883, 896-897; see also Espinoza v. Hepta Run, Inc. (2022) 74 Cal. App. 5th 44, 59 ["an individual must have engaged in some affirmative action beyond his or her status as an owner, officer or director of the corporation."].)

Here, even under CCP 452 [pleadings are read liberally], plaintiff fails to plead sufficient ultimate facts showing that defendant "caused" the misclassification within the meaning of Labor Code sec. 558.1. The court grants 20 days leave to amend for plaintiff to allege ultimate facts showing how defendant participated in the relevant employment decisions.

Order signed.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Brianna Rudd, CSR No. 13668, Email: briannarudd@gmail.com, Tel: 209-747-1306. (302/CK)
